slug: ว่าด้วยการ-เตรียมงาน-ถ่
title: ว่าด้วยการ "เตรียมงาน" ... ถ่ายรูป
content: When it comes to choosing a photographer, **trust** is the most important thing. The chosen photographer will be your "best friend" during the photo shoot. The photographer will be able to read your mind, if s/he has to. :P Photo taken by [tonz](http://www.tallenough.com/).
